'''Verrinnefra B'thog Indriummsegh''' was an [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] serving in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who was active during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Verrinnefra was of the signatures on the [[Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets]]<ref name="TABSB" /> after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. [[4 ABY/Legends|One month]] later, Indriummsegh signed the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|Declaration]] of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] alongside with other important leaders of the Alliance like [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], [[Borsk Fey'lya]], and [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].

[[File:VerrinnefraBthogIndriummseghSignature-HttES.jpg|thumb|left|130px|Verrinnefra B'thog Indriummsegh's signature]]

Some months after that, Indriummsegh and the other signatories of the Declaration of a New Republic became the mobile [[New Republic Provisional Council]], with Mon Mothma as the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]]. This Inner Council would be active until the capture of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the New Republic, [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], to be replaced by the first [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], he was one of the signatories of ''[[Why Do We Fight the Empire?]]''. Indriummsegh himself was replaced at some point prior to [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Rattagagech]].
